title: HG Limescale Remover Foam Spray, Kitchen & Bathroom Cleaner, Anti-Scale Surface Spray – 500ml
features: HG Limescale Remover spray: This fast-acting foam formula removes limescale and other stubborn deposits from tiles, shower doors, cubicles, bath screens, shower heads, taps, sinks or kitchen worktops
All purpose descaler: Works as a kitchen tap spray, sink cleaner, bathroom descaler, shower head cleaner, shower screen cleaner or tile cleaner. A multi-tasking kitchen spray or bathroom spray
Tough on limescale, gentle on surfaces: Highly concentrated and powerful, but safe for multi surface materials around the home. Non abrasive and won't damage surface materials when removing scale
Removes dirt and muck: Also removes rust, verdigris, soap scum and urine stains. Restores your shower head to its ideal flow. Chrome, stainless steel, ceramic, glaze, glass and plastic safe
1 x HG Limescale Remover Spray, 500ml. Discover the full range of HG cleaning products, including HG Grout Cleaner, HG Mould Remover, multi surface cleaners and all purpose cleaner sprays
description: Product Description HG Limescale Remover Foam Spray is a highly concentrated professional-grade kitchen or bathroom scale remover, ideal for the safe removal of stubborn limescale and unsightly deposits in your home. This strong descaler is suitable for removing scale and mucky marks from tiles, sinks, shower doors, screens, toilets, bath tubs or taps. This heavy duty cleaner can also be used for removing limescale from poorly spraying shower heads, or rust and urine stains. Ultra powerful yet safe for most materials - including chrome, stainless steel, ceramic, glaze, glass and plastic - this bathroom cleaner and grout cleaner creates a thick foam for minimal scrubbing, whilst preventing scale build up. Includes: 1 x HG Limescale Remover Foam (500ml spray). How to use: 1. Apply to surfaces that need treatment. 2. Leave to work for a maximum of 5 minutes. 3. Rinse or wipe the surface with a damp cloth. Avoid contact with skin. Keep this HG cleaner out of children's reach. Always read the label. Discover the HG professional range of specialist household cleaning products and cleaning sprays, including HG Mould Remover, HG Scale Remover for appliances, multi-purpose cleaners and all surface cleaner sprays for your home, office or outside space. Box Contains 1 x 500ml
